positive: Stylized illustration of a celestial river flowing through a minimalist jungle grove. The river is composed of bioluminescent stars and crescent moons, illuminating oversized tropical flora and exotic fauna. Central focus on a majestic, stylized orchid structure hanging over the river, acting as a natural bridge. The overall mood is dreamlike and mystical. Style should be a blend of clean vector art, deep engraving style, and graphic novel aesthetic. Composition must be perfectly balanced and centered, featuring strong, thick black outlines and limited, highly contrasted color palettes (deep teal, luminous gold, midnight blue). High contrast, suitable for screen printing on apparel, isolated on a clean background.
negative: blurry, noisy, watermark, signature, text, logo, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, out of focus, realistic photo, photorealistic, grain, jpeg artifacts
